## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (type, optional scope, imperative subject under 72 chars)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the behaviour change
- [ ] KoSIT-strict still green against the fixture corpus (`composer kosit`)
- [ ] PHPStan max and Psalm level 1 pass with no new baseline entries
- [ ] Public API changes are documented in `docs/` and noted in the PR body
- [ ] Snapshot fixtures regenerated only with explicit reasoning in this PR description
